description_long: This is a tall, slender floor lamp with a minimalist, modern design. The lamp features a circular, weighted base that appears to be made of metal, providing stability. A thin, vertical pole extends upward from the base, supporting a conical lampshade at the top. The lampshade is angled downward and is also constructed from metal, matching the rest of the lamp in color and finish. The lamp's structure is simple and geometric, with clean lines and a matte black finish throughout. There are no visible decorative embellishments, emphasizing its contemporary and functional aesthetic.
description: A tall, minimalist black floor lamp with a conical shade and circular base, featuring a sleek, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slim pole, circular base, and the conical shade directly above the pole.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the horizontal arm supporting the conical shade, emphasizing the lamp's L-shaped profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the conical shade aligned above the pole and the base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the horizontal arm and conical shade, mirroring view 1 but from the other side.
